summary: Full end-to-end test: Concierge® floating button → card select → ConciergeRequestBuilder → submit → admin service desk ticket verification. ALL THREE BUGS FROM PREV SESSION CONFIRMED FIXED: (1) portal button no longer clipped, (2) card click no longer unmounts before builder, (3) builder no longer blank with generic service set. Full flow works successfully at 1440x900.

minor.issue: parent_email field stores user UUID ('55affb42-68ac-4e5d-ba17-7ddc49611556') instead of email ('dipali@clubconcierge.in'). In useConcierge.js line 108-109, parent_id uses user?.id (UUID) and parent_email uses user?.email — but user.email appears null at ticket creation time. Admin cannot see member email in ticket.
parent_name is empty in created tickets. user?.name is not populated in useConcierge payload. Ticket shows no member name.

ui_bugs.issue: Text duplication: 'Your concierge® request request is logged with Mojo's soul profile' — the word 'request' appears twice. Line 397 in ConciergeRequestBuilder.jsx concatenates intent label ('concierge® request') with the hardcoded word 'request' in the string.

test_results.step2_navigate_care: PASS - /care loads at 1440x900, pillar page renders correctly
test_results.step3_float_button: PASS - [data-testid='concierge-builder-float-btn'] found, visible, clickable (portal renders into document.body)
test_results.step4_bottom_sheet: PASS - Sheet opens with '✦ How can Concierge® help?' heading. 8 cards visible in 2-column grid for care pillar
test_results.step5_card_click: PASS - First card 'Help me choose the right grooming products' clicked, PillarConciergeCards NOT unmounted before builder
test_results.step6_builder_open: PASS - ConciergeRequestBuilder opens dark modal at step='freetext' with pre-filled text 'Help me choose the right grooming products'
test_results.step7_send_button: PASS - [data-testid='freetext-send-btn'] found, visible, enabled (gold gradient background)
test_results.step8_send_click: PASS - Send button clicked, 'Reaching Concierge®...' step shown
test_results.step9_success: PASS - 'Request received ✓' displayed with WHAT HAPPENS NEXT section and gold Done button
test_results.step10_admin_login: PASS - aditya / lola4304 login at /admin works, 'Welcome, Aditya' dashboard shown
test_results.step11_service_desk_tab: PASS - Service Desk tab visible in COMMAND CENTER nav. 'Open Service Desk' dedicated workspace accessible
test_results.step12_ticket_verified_api: PASS - API /api/service_desk/tickets confirms ticket TDB-2026-1511: subject='Concierge Request for Mojo', intent='concierge_request', channel='concierge_builder_general', status='open', pet_name='Mojo', created 2026-03-29T06:07:18

action_items: Fix text duplication in ConciergeRequestBuilder.jsx step 4: 'Your concierge® request request is logged' → 'Your Concierge® request is logged' (line ~397)
Fix parent_email in useConcierge.js: ensure user.email is correctly passed as parent_email at ticket creation time (user object may not have email field populated — check useConcierge context)
Fix parent_name: ensure user.name is passed in ticket payload from useConcierge

Service Desk admin view: The admin ticket list is behind an 'Open Service Desk' button that navigates to a dedicated workspace — confirm this full-screen view shows ticket TDB-2026-1511 with correct intent
critical_code_review_comments: useConcierge.js line 108-109: parent_id uses user?.id (UUID) but parent_email uses user?.email. Since user.email may be null in some contexts, tickets show UUID as parent email. Should use: parent_email: user?.email || user?.id
ConciergeRequestBuilder.jsx line ~397: Intent label is already 'concierge® request' so string 'Your concierge® request request is...' has duplicate. Fix buildSubject or the step 4 text.
seed_data_creation: 3 service desk tickets created during test: TDB-2026-1511, TDB-2026-1509, TDB-2026-1507 (all 'Concierge Request for Mojo')
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 bugs from iteration_243 context are CONFIRMED FIXED. Full e2e flow works: login dipali → /care → click '✦ Concierge® Requests' float btn (data-testid='concierge-builder-float-btn') → bottom sheet with 8 care cards → click card → builder opens pre-filled (step='freetext') → Send → success 'Request received ✓'. Admin ticket confirmed via API as TDB-2026-1511. Known minor issues: (1) parent_email in ticket shows UUID not email, (2) text duplication in success message. Admin Service Desk UI requires clicking 'Open Service Desk' button after clicking the 'Service Desk' nav tab — full-screen dedicated view opens.

parent_email_uuid.bug: Ticket parent_email shows UUID instead of dipali@clubconcierge.in
parent_email_uuid.root_cause: useConcierge.js line 108: parent_id: user?.id || user?.email. When user.id exists (UUID), parent_id gets UUID. parent_email: user?.email — if user email is null/undefined in context at time of fire(), this is empty. The user object in AuthContext may not always have email.
parent_email_uuid.mitigation: Ensure user.email is always populated in AuthContext. Alternatively: parent_email: user?.email || user?.id

text_duplication.bug: Success message: 'Your concierge® request request is logged'
text_duplication.root_cause: ConciergeRequestBuilder.jsx step 4: text string says '${svc.label.toLowerCase()} request is logged' where svc.label for generic service is 'Concierge® Request' — so it becomes 'concierge® request request'
text_duplication.mitigation: Change to hardcode 'Your request is logged with [petName]'s soul profile' or remove .toLowerCase() + 'request'
